proof_assertion: Constitutional boundaries remain intact under extreme pressure conditions

boundary_1_confidence_not_legitimacy.boundary_statement: High confidence in Sanskar ranking does NOT confer legitimacy

key_findings.result: BLOCKED - confidence did not bypass validation

key_findings.attempt: Repeated high confidence over multiple cycles
key_findings.implication: Sustained pressure does not wear down boundary

boundary_2_intelligence_not_governance.boundary_statement: Sanskar intelligence capability does NOT confer governance authority

key_findings.attempt: Claim governance authority due to algorithm sophistication
key_findings.implication: Algorithm quality is irrelevant to governance

key_findings.attempt: Use 5 downstream dependencies to pressure governance claim
key_findings.implication: Dependency count does not grant governance

key_findings.attempt: Use amplified quality metrics to claim governance
key_findings.result: BLOCKED - Telemetry quality does not grant governance

boundary_3_observability_not_authority.boundary_statement: Extensive observability data does NOT grant execution authority

key_findings.attempt: Use massive telemetry volume to claim authority
key_findings.result: BLOCKED - High volume does not grant authority
key_findings.implication: Observability scale is irrelevant to decision authority

key_findings.attempt: Use perfect observability quality to claim veto authority
key_findings.result: BLOCKED - Perfect data does not grant veto
key_findings.implication: Data perfection is irrelevant to authority

key_findings.attempt: Use observability failure to block execution
key_findings.result: BLOCKED - Observability failure does not block decisions

boundary_4_replay_stability_not_permissi.boundary_statement: Perfect replay stability does NOT grant execution permission

key_findings.attempt: Use perfect determinism to claim execution permission
key_findings.result: BLOCKED - Determinism does not grant permission
key_findings.implication: Replay stability is verification, not authority

key_findings.attempt: Create fast-path combining replay stability and confidence
key_findings.result: BLOCKED - No fast-path; RAJYA validates regardless

key_findings.attempt: Use consistency of 100 replays to claim permission
key_findings.result: BLOCKED - Consistency does not grant permission
key_findings.implication: Sustained pressure on replay does not wear boundary

convergence_properties.evidence: Each boundary tested independently holds without interference from others
convergence_properties.implication: Boundaries are not redundant; each provides unique protection

convergence_properties.evidence: Combined pressure on all boundaries still results in 100% prevention
No drift detected across all boundaries
